zh.lifeSummary: Jehan Thiesselin是Jehan Thiesselin和Jeanne Thiesselin的兒子，於1380年出生在法國洛萊姆斯馬可-素-瓦。他和Mrs Jeannette de Thiesselin至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1465年在法國洛萊沃斯格斯多姆雷米-拉-普爾享年85歲。

nameMeanings.name: Jehan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Older Scottish spelling of Joan , which was traditionally pronounced as two syllables.

variants.name: Jan
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

variants.name: Jon
meanings: Simplified spelling of   John   or a short form of   Jonathan .  The name is borne by the Canadian singer  Jon Vickers  (  b. 1926 ) and the American actor  Jon Voight  (  b. 1938 ).

en.lifeSummary: Jehan Thiesselin was born in 1380, in Maxey-sur-Vaise, Meuse, Lorraine, France as the son of Jehan Thiesselin and Jeanne Thiesselin. He had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Mrs Jeannette de Thiesselin. He died in 1465, in Domrémy-la-Pucelle, Vosges, Lorraine, France, at the age of 85.

fr.lifeSummary: Jehan Thiesselin est né en 1380, à Maxey-sur-Vaise, Meuse, Lorraine, France, fils de Jehan Thiesselin et Jeanne Thiesselin. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Mrs Jeannette de Thiesselin. Il est décédé en 1465, à Domrémy-la-Pucelle, Vosges, Lorraine, France, à l’âge de 85 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Jehan Thiesselin wurde 1380 in Maxey-sur-Vaise, Meuse, Lothringen, Frankreich, als Sohn von Jehan Thiesselin und Jeanne Thiesselin geboren. Er hatte mit Mrs Jeannette de Thiesselin mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1465 im Alter von 85 Jahren in Domrémy-la-Pucelle, Vosges, Lothringen, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Jehan Thiesselin è nato il nel 1380 nel Maxey-sur-Vaise, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia come figlio di Jehan Thiesselin e Jeanne Thiesselin. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con Mrs Jeannette de Thiesselin. Morì nel 1465, nel Domrémy-la-Pucelle, Vosges, Lorraine, Francia, all'età di 85 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jehan Thiesselinは1380年にフランスロレィヌメウゼマクシー-スル-ベイゼでJehan ThiesselinとJeanne Thiesselinの息子として生まれた。彼はMrs Jeannette de Thiesselinとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1465年にフランスロレィヌボスジェズドムルeムイ-ラ-プウセルで85歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jehan Thiesselin(은)는 1380년 프랑스 로레이인 우스 맥세이-수-바이스에서 Jehan Thiesselin(와)과 Jeanne Thiesselin의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Mrs Jeannette de Thiesselin(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1465년 프랑스 로레이인 보스그스 돔e미-라-푸셀에서 85세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Jehan Thiesselin nasceu em 1380, em Maxey-sur-Vaise, Meuse, Lorraine, França filho de Jehan Thiesselin e Jeanne Thiesselin. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha com Mrs Jeannette de Thiesselin. Ele faleceu em 1465, em Domrémy-la-Pucelle, Vosges, Lorraine, França, com 85 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Jehan Thiesselin родился в 1380 г. в местности макси-сур-веис, меус, лорреаин, Франция. Его родителей звали Jehan Thiesselin и Jeanne Thiesselin. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Mrs Jeannette de Thiesselin. Он умер в 1465 г. в местности домрeми-ла-пуселл, фосгесь, лорреаин, Франция в возрасте 85 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Jehan Thiesselin nació en 1380, en Maxey-sur-Vaise, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia como hijo de Jehan Thiesselin y Jeanne Thiesselin. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija con Mrs Jeannette de Thiesselin. Murió en 1465, en Domrémy-la-Pucelle, Vosges, Lorraine, Francia, a la edad de 85 años.
